items.title: Don’t miss GIGABYTE’s AERO X16 RTX 5050 gaming laptop while it’s down to its lowest price at $585 off
items.summary:
As part of its wider clearance sale, Woot is offering GIGABYTE’s AERO X16 RTX 5050-powered gaming laptop for $915.25 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise). This is one of the entry-level models in the brand’s AERO X16 lineup that typically goes for $1,500 at Amazon. Today’s deal at Woot takes $585 off its usual going rate, marking the lowest price we have tracked for this machine with a 39% discount. We’ve seen the high-end variants of this laptop with an RTX 5060 and even an RTX 5070 see plenty of discounts previously at Best Buy, but this value-packed model with an RTX 5050 GPU has never dropped below the $1,000 mark. It delivers a great value for your money at this price if you’re looking to buy an entry-level gaming laptop, and you can learn more about it below.

more…

The VORSA Lite e-bike down at $1,395 shipped, while the standard VORSA e-bike is at $1,595 shipped, and the FT (Fat Tire) model is also down at $1,595 shipped. The standard and FT versions of this e-bike are down from $1,695 full prices, while the Lite model is dropping from a $1,495 price tag, which has consistently been the discount we’ve seen on them since getting their first savings back in August 2025, though it’s not regularly featured in sales like some of the other e-bikes under the brand’s flag. For the rest of this sale, you’re getting another shot at saving $100 at the lowest prices we have tracked.
